text.title: Growth Social Media Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the ICP locked AND fit-score matrix for ≥3 platform candidates computed?

branch.question: Can the operator sustain ≥10 replies/day on the top-2 platforms?

branch.conclusion: Produce PACE spec: top-2 platforms, atomization loop, engagement quotas.
Shrink to 1 platform; re-spec engagement quota.
Skip this methodology. Lock ICP + compute fit-score matrix first.

text.example: icp=B2B-saas-founders matrix=LinkedIn-9.1 X-7.3 YT-5.0 → primary=[LinkedIn,X]; budget=8h; atomization=blog→2-LI+3-X → run PACE per r1.
